topic: sandy soil structure and vineyard drainage
trigger_keywords: elemento del suelo influye más directamente en el drenaje del viñedo
afirmaciones sobre los suelos arenosos en viticultura
suelos arenosos se caracterizan por su buen drenaje y baja retención hídrica

steps.label: cause
steps.text: A vineyard soil contains a high proportion of relatively large sand particles.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: The larger pore spaces between particles allow water to move through the soil more rapidly than through a fine, compact clay structure.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: Sandy structure promotes free drainage and reduces water retention, affecting root water availability and vine vigour.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Sandy structure promotes free drainage and reduces water retention, affecting root water availability and vine vigour.
